metadata.description: A Claude-Code-native agent harness with an MCP-portable enforcement and tooling core. Each module is an independently installable plugin.

plugins.name: ideal-harness-core
plugins.description: Substrate: plugin loader, skill templating + multi-host generation, validation, bootstrap skill. Required by all other modules.

plugins.name: ideal-harness-guard
plugins.description: Enforcement floor below the LLM: deny-wins policy, permission defaults, injection defense, secret redaction + broker, skill vetting, drift-guard, sandbox.

plugins.name: ideal-harness-compress
plugins.description: Deterministic, cache-safe tool_result compression (JSON sampling, log RLE, stack-trace collapse) with a Compress-Cache-Retrieve store, plus the caveman output-side terse mode.

plugins.name: ideal-harness-memory
plugins.description: Structural code-graph with token-budgeted subgraph retrieval + episodic memory with BM25 relevance ranking and a curator that reconciles claims against tool-call evidence.

plugins.name: ideal-harness-orchestrate
plugins.description: Orchestration & control flow: durable task ledger, tool registry, loop/no-progress guard, spend governor, API retry/backoff, session resume/checkpoint, plus subagent-driven-development and brainstorming skills.
